metadata.title: The Stroke (Remastered 2010)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:04.91] Now everybody
[00:07.79] Have you heard
[00:09.91] If you're in the game
[00:12.52] Then the stroke's the word?
[00:16.90] Don't take no rhythm
[00:19.23] Don't take no style
[00:21.65] Gotta thirst for killin'
[00:24.20] Grab your vial and, whoo!
[00:36.32] Put your right hand out
[00:39.13] Give a firm handshake
[00:42.05] Talk to me
[00:44.12] About that one big break
[00:47.96] Spread your ear pollution
[00:50.50] Both far and wide
[00:53.39] Keep your contributions
[00:55.65] By your side and
[00:57.48] Stroke me, stroke me
[01:00.09] Could be a winner, boy, you move mighty well
[01:02.85] Stroke me, stroke me
[01:05.24] (Stroke)
[01:07.95] Stroke me, stroke me
[01:10.94] You got your number down
[01:13.44] Stroke me, stroke me
[01:15.78] Say you're a winner, man you're just a sinner now
[01:28.64] Put your left foot out
[01:31.21] Keep it all in place
[01:34.37] Work your way
[01:36.52] Right into my face
[01:40.62] First you try to bet me
[01:42.94] You make my backbone slide
[01:45.76] When you find you've bent me
[01:48.07] Slip on by, keep on
[01:50.19] Stroke me, stroke me
[01:52.58] Give me the reason, this is all night long
[01:55.12] Stroke me, stroke me
[01:57.82] (Stroke)
[02:00.68] Stroke me, stroke me
[02:03.28] Yourself together, boy
[02:06.10] Stroke me, stroke me
[02:08.40] Say you're a winner but, man, you're just a sinner now
[02:12.36] (Stroke, stroke, stroke)
[02:16.33] (Stroke, stroke, stroke, stroke)
[02:32.17] Better listen now
[02:34.72] They said it ain't no joke
[02:37.05] Don't let your conscience fail ya
[02:39.65] Just do the stroke
[02:43.69] Don't ya take no chances
[02:46.27] Keep your eye on top
[02:48.96] Do your fancy dances
[02:51.17] You can't stop, you just
[02:53.36] Stroke me, stroke me
[02:55.82] (Stroke, stroke)
[02:58.61] Stroke me, stroke me
[03:01.25] (Stroke, stroke)
[03:03.74] Stroke me, stroke me
[03:06.58] (Stroke, stroke)
[03:09.25] Stroke me, stroke me
[03:11.59] (Stroke) do it
[03:14.22] Stroke me, stroke me
[03:16.98] (Stroke)
[03:19.23] Stroke me, stroke me (keep on)
[03:22.38] (Stroke)
[03:24.55] Stroke me, stroke me
[03:27.33] (Stroke)
[03:29.67] Stroke me, stroke me
[03:32.27] Say you're a winner but, man, you're just a sinner now
[03:35.95]
